name: LJ’s Winter Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, except the spaghetti.
2. Bring to a boil and then turn off the heat.
3. Break the spaghetti into 1 inch long pieces in a separate pot.
4. Cook until tender and drain. Place spaghetti into the soup.
5. Stir and bring the soup back to a boil. Then turn off the heat.
